channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
The shift from bots to real AI agents is inevitable.
Teams that win won’t add more dashboards. They...
item.description:
The shift from bots to real AI agents is inevitable.
Teams that win won’t add more dashboards. They’ll remove repetitive work entirely.
Watch the full video to see how execution-first AI actually works.
Don't miss out on the latest AI advancements! Sign up here to stay informed! https://t.co/X4PphN0oWR
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
The underrated part is flexibility at scale.
One agent can cover multiple roles:
→ Sales → Support...
item.description:
The underrated part is flexibility at scale.
One agent can cover multiple roles:
→ Sales → Support → Marketing → Operations
Configured through templates and brand language. Deployed across web, WhatsApp, mobile, and voice. Integrated directly with CRMs, calendars, and payments.
This is how AI becomes a teammate, not a tool.
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 0
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
Most companies are still celebrating chatbots that reply.
The real breakthrough is AI that executes...
item.description:
Most companies are still celebrating chatbots that reply.
The real breakthrough is AI that executes.
This shift from bots to agents is exactly what @KailyAi is betting on, and it changes how work actually gets done.
Here’s the breakdown ↓ https://t.co/OhagkDv3Ck
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 0
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:

item.title: 看完王宁的书 最触动的地方竟然是这里 看来我应该去看褚时健的书 https://t.co/PYPzSxPdW9

item.title:
乐观主义的原则： 所有的是知识不足导致的
一个问题很困难 正是让人们去解决它的原因之一
地球，不是人类永恒和唯一的家园 只是一场无尽冒险的起点 https://t.co/X2DReeRTU8
item.description:

item.title: RT @Replit: We’ve invested deeply in security at Replit, including our recent launches with Security...
item.description:
